action.reasoning: Observation: Best accuracy 80.32% with ConvNeXt-Tiny + mixup/LS/EMA. Iterations 2-3 failed due to scheduler bugs (now fixed). Analysis: With 40% label noise, self-training can help by using warmup model's predictions to downweight/correct noisy labels. Decision: Implement self-training - load warmup model, generate soft labels with TTA, train with confidence-weighted loss combining hard and soft labels. Fine-tune from warmup weights for 30 epochs.
